# CredentialBindingAction enumeration

The action a client takes for a discovered issuer, per the credential-binding rules (spec §23.16).

```csharp
public enum CredentialBindingAction
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Reuse | `0` | Reuse the stored credentials. |
| ReRegister | `1` | Re-register with the discovered authorization server. |
| SurfaceError | `2` | Surface an error rather than silently using mismatched credentials. |
